CREATE TABLE domains (id UInt32, domain String);
SELECT idnaEncode(domain) FROM domains WHERE id = 1;
SELECT idnaEncode(domain) FROM domains WHERE domain LIKE '%münchen%';
SELECT idnaEncode(domain) FROM domains WHERE domain IN (SELECT domain FROM domains WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id, idnaEncode(domain) AS encoded_domain FROM domains WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM domains WHERE domain LIKE '%.de');
CREATE TABLE encoded_domains AS SELECT id, idnaEncode(domain) AS encoded_domain FROM domains;
SELECT encoded_domain FROM encoded_domains WHERE encoded_domain LIKE '%xn--%';
CREATE TABLE invalid_domains (id UInt32, domain String);
WITH (SELECT idnaEncode(domain) AS encoded FROM domains) AS subquery SELECT domain, encoded FROM subquery JOIN domains ON domains.domain = subquery.encoded;
SELECT id, idnaEncode(domain) AS encoded_domain FROM domains WHERE domain NOT LIKE '%.com';
